raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reorganizing the content into a logical flow that builds on previous information.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the clarity and coherence of the original text.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two claims, specifically softening the validation claim and noting the need for an ablation study to isolate contributions.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all requested dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with a minor regression in the ambiguity of the 14-F1 gain computation against baselines, which was not clarified.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for major rewrites."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reorganizing the content into a logical flow that builds on previous information.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the clarity and coherence of the original text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two claims, specifically softening the validation claim and noting the need for an ablation study to isolate contributions.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all requested dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with a minor regression in the ambiguity of the 14-F1 gain computation against baselines, which was not clarified.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for major rewrites.
